scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentmesh/core && npm run build -w @agentmesh/agent-base && npm run build -w @agentmesh/agent-research && npm run build -w @agentmesh/agent-sales-crm && npm run build -w @agentmesh/agent-code-review && npm run build -w @agentmesh/voice && npm run build -w @agentmesh/gateway && npm run build -w @agentmesh/dashboard
scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,research,sales,review,voice,dash -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev -w @agentmesh/core" "npm run dev -w @agentmesh/agent-research" "npm run dev -w @agentmesh/agent-sales-crm" "npm run dev -w @agentmesh/agent-code-review" "npm run dev -w @agentmesh/voice" "npm run dev -w @agentmesh/dashboard"
